label: 第111話
source_locator: 単行本13巻 目次 p.91
summary_short: 陀艮を倒した甚爾は次の強者として伏黒を連れ去る。残された七海・直毘人・真希は漏瑚の炎に焼かれ、漏瑚は宿儺の気配を察知する。
summary_full: 陀艮を倒した甚爾の肉体は、周囲で最も強い相手を求めて伏黒を選び、彼だけを建物外へ連れ去る。残された七海・真希・直毘人の前へ漏瑚が現れ、陀艮の死を悟って三人を炎で焼く。直毘人は投射呪法で一度かわすが、片腕を失って動きの精度が落ち、追撃を受ける。漏瑚は宿儺の気配を追い、意識を失った虎杖と指を持つ美々子・菜々子を発見する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 甚爾 effortlessly defeats 陀艮 , but the jujutsu sorcerers ' problems are far from over. 恵 is taken away from the group and the others are suddenly burnt alive by a vengeful 漏瑚 . Before he can finish them off for good, 漏瑚 notices 宿儺 's presence in 渋谷 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 甚爾 makes short work of 陀艮. 甚爾 pierces 陀艮's face, stabbing him clean through the head with the sharpened 游雲 . 陀艮 believes he can still fight, but 甚爾 brutally threads 游雲 through 陀艮's head and stabs him in the eye as well. Then he breaks the chain connecting the three-section staff together and rapidly uses both sharpened sides to obliterate 陀艮. The domain is dispelled and 真希 is shocked that the lone fighter was able to exorcise such a powerful 呪霊 singlehandedly. 恵 is exhausted from holding his domain for so long and takes the moment to catch his breath. 七海 knows that if 恵 hadn't shown they would have all been killed but now they have a new problem, they can't be sure if 甚爾 is on their side or not. 漏瑚 suddenly arrives to avenge 陀艮. 甚爾 is still fighting on instinct as a puppet of incarnate, baring his fangs at the strongest around. 恵 may be exhausted but he's by far the least injured. 甚爾 drags him outside the station in an instant by breaking through the corridor window. Before 恵 can even process what was happening, he finds himself outside on the road. 恵 lands safely but he looks across the street at his opponent with a surprised expression. He claims this ridiculously level of speed even surpasses 宿儺's from back when they fought. 真希 yells out of concern for 恵, but she's interrupted by a new presence behind her. 漏瑚 arrives to mourn 陀艮, picking up his exorcised ashes and bids farewell to his friend. Heavily injured, 直毘人 and 七海 find it unfair that immediately after fighting 陀艮 they're faced with a new curse that far surpasses him. 漏瑚 tells 陀艮 to leave the rest to him and that he looks forward to their reunion in the wastelands a hundred years in the future. 漏瑚 claims 七海, 真希, and 直毘人 as his victims. Onto the next subject, 漏瑚 looks back over his shoulder with a menacing glare that fills the room with his malice. Within a second, 漏瑚 has his palm placed on 七海's waist. He says "that's one" and blasts 七海 with an explosive wave of cursed flames. Before 真希 can even yell out 七海's name in concern, 漏瑚 lights her aflame as well. He says "that's two" and moves to claim a third victim. However, 直毘人 gets behind 漏瑚, surprising the curse with his speed. 直毘人's innate technique : 投射呪法 , divides a single second into twenty-four frames and uses his field of view as the projection's angle of view. By doing so, 直毘人 can trace a predetermined set of movements to perform within those twenty-four frames. Additionally anything touched by 直毘人's plan who does not abide by "24 FPS" rule while moving will be frozen inside an animation frame for one second. The predetermined set of movements cannot be adjusted once started and it's trajectory cannot excessively ignore the laws of physics. 直毘人 was born with a natural sense of strategic timing and movement. So much so, he was deemed the fastest jujutsu sorcerer excluding 五条悟 . That being said, this was when 直毘人 still had both arms. 漏瑚 is interrupted by a powerful surge of 宿儺's presence. Two small volcanic openings suddenly appear behind 直毘人. He can't avoid the crossing heatwaves in time and is heavily burnt by 漏瑚's technique. 漏瑚 says "that's three" and prepares to finish 直毘人 off. 宿儺's strong presence abruptly gives 漏瑚 chills and immediately grabs his attention. He surmises a finger has been released somewhere nearby and goes off to search for it. Meanwhile, 菜々子 枷場 and 美々子 find 悠仁's unconscious body in the aftermath of his fight with 脹相. They force feed him one of 宿儺の指 and 漏瑚 finds them soon after. Annoyed, he demands to know how many fingers they fed him and the girls flee using 菜々子's 術式. While 宿儺's marks still remain on 悠仁's face, 漏瑚 decides to make the best of the situation. Pseudo-夏油 informed 漏瑚 beforehand that if 悠仁 ate a finger a day for twenty days he probably wouldn't lose control of his body to 宿儺 despite devouring all twenty of his fingers. In contrast, feeding 悠仁 ten fingers at once might temporarily force him to lose control. 漏瑚 takes out a small scroll of ten 宿儺 fingers and tells the King of Curses that it's time to wake up.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 伏黒甚爾 陀艮 伏黒恵 七海建人 禪院真希 禪院直毘人 宿儺 (回想) 漏瑚 虎杖悠仁 菜々子 美々子 Pseudo-夏油 (回想)

candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪物 宿儺's 宿儺の指 x11 呪具 游雲 陀艮の術式 領域展開：蕩蘊平線 漏瑚の術式 Disaster Flames 禪院直毘人の術式 投射呪法 菜々子の術式 菜々子's 名称不明の生得術式 術式

key_events_verified_phase6: 甚爾が伏黒を戦場外へ連れ去る
漏瑚が七海・真希・直毘人を炎で焼く
漏瑚が虎杖と宿儺の指を発見する
verification_notes_phase6: 集英社公式12～14巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第六段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
